## Checklist

- [ ] Code is formatted (`cargo fmt`, `vp run oxfmt`).
- [ ] Lint passes (`cargo clippy -- -D warnings`, `vp run oxlint`).

- [ ] Docs / README updated if behavior or interfaces changed.
